chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1321 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5107/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 10-09-2025 M/s Ali Gul Abbasi and Muhammad Zohaib Rajput, Advocates for the Petitioners Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Saeed Ahmed Ghanghro, Assistant Mukhtiarkar, Rohri. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Additional AG has filed para-wise comments on behalf of Respondents No.6 and 8, which are taken on record. A perusal of the said comments reveals that the alleged road is not passing through the lands of the Petitioners, i.e., Blocks No.71 and 72, but rather is being constructed through Blocks No.103 and 104. In view of the above, the stance taken by the Petitioners in this Petition stands specifically controverted by Respondents No.6 and 8 in their comments. The controversy raised in the present Petition involves disputed questions of fact, which cannot be resolved by this Court while exercising its constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution. Such issues essentially require recording of evidence before the competent forum. Accordingly, this Petition, being not maintainable is dismissed along with the listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
